Pltf'S Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery And For Evidentiary Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terry Gross, Esq. of Gross Belsky Alonso LLP, Tel. 415.544.0200, for plaintiff and moving party;
Robert C. Smith, Esq. of Dimitriou & Associates PC, Tel. 415.434.1144, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The parties stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. After oral argument, the Court takes PLAINTIFF GROSS BELSKY ALONSO LLP's Motion To Compel Discovery And For Evidentiary Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions under submission. Plaintiff motion was taken under submission on December 5, 2013, now court rules plaintiff Gross Belsky Alonso LLP's motion for evidentiary sanctions is denied. Plaintiff's motion for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $500.00 see order for details. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU and DIMITRIOU & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Second amended complaint states a cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS ANDREW DIMITRIOU AND DIMITRIOU & ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to allege all elements of each cause of action. Default entered on July 25, 2013 was set aside by the Court. Plaintiff's untimely unauthorized Supplemental Opposition is stricken. Moving party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
